personal.name: Sanket Sunil Deshmukh
personal.title: Data Engineer & Agentic AI Engineer
personal.bio: Data Engineer and Agentic AI practitioner with 3+ years of industry experience building large-scale ETL pipelines and distributed data systems for global banking clients. Skilled in Apache Spark, Spring Boot, and LLM-driven workflow automation. Currently pursuing an MS in Computer Science at the University of Florida and building agentic AI solutions to automate enterprise processes.

workExperience.description: Building agentic AI and LLM-powered automation for university-wide campus service workflows.
bullets: Automated manual campus service workflows using agentic AI and LLM-based agents, reducing repetitive support effort for enterprise systems
Designed and evaluated prompt-driven Python workflows, improving response accuracy and reliability across thousands of student and faculty interactions.
Developed NaviGator AI — a reusable prompt library fine-tuned on institutional datasets, accelerating deployment of new AI use cases by 30%.

workExperience.description: Building agentic AI and LLM-powered automation for university-wide campus service workflows.
bullets: Built and deployed a RAG-powered AI chatbot on AWS Amplify (LLaMA 3.1, semantic embeddings, 122+ providers), reducing irrelevant food resource results by ~60% via PostGIS spatial filtering and history-aware intent extraction.

Engineered dual-layer guardrails with 7-step input validation — prompt injection, crisis routing, PII scrubbing — securing 100% of chatbot sessions with zero PII persisted, hosted on a serverless AWS-backed architecture.

Designed a PostgreSQL + PostGIS schema with Row-Level Security across 6 tables for sub-100ms geo-queries; automated ingestion of 122 providers via a Python CSV pipeline, with CI/CD managed through AWS Amplify reducing deployment overhead by ~70%.

workExperience.description: Designed and maintained production-grade ETL pipelines and data platforms for a global banking client with 5M+ users.
bullets: Designed and implemented 15+ ETL pipelines using Java, Apache Spark, and Spring Boot, processing 1M+ records daily from CSV, binary, and streaming sources across customer holdings, transactions, and forex rates.
Migrated legacy Beeline/Hive jobs to Spark, achieving ~45% faster execution across complex multi-account banking data flows.
Built Spark modules for the MiFID II-compliant Cost and Charges (CnC) platform, computing per-customer investment costs and reducing manual audit intervention.
Architected data archiving and partitioning strategies to improve query performance by 60%, supporting regulated data retention and historical lookups.
Streamlined CI/CD using Jenkins, Nexus, and Bitbucket with automated regression tests, cutting post-release defects by 70%.
Integrated Swagger-documented Spring Boot RESTful APIs using Dependency Injection and Factory patterns, accelerating frontend integration by 40%.

workExperience.description: Built a blockchain-based multi-party contract management system with end-to-end encryption and decentralized storage.
bullets: Developed a web-based blockchain application enabling up to 5 parties to securely share, sign, and verify contracts using decentralized logic.
Authored and deployed 4+ Solidity smart contracts on the Rinkeby Testnet via Web3.js and Node.js, supporting pilot runs with 10+ test users.
Applied AES-256 and RSA-2048 encryption to secure access keys and contract documents; stored 20+ signed contracts on IPFS for tamper resistance.
Used Truffle and Ganache for local contract testing, cutting testnet debugging time by 40%.

workExperience.description: Built a native Android app to digitize event management and internal operations for the CSI student chapter.
bullets: Developed a native Android application for CSI-DBIT, digitizing event management workflows and driving a 40% increase in student participation.
Built task schedulers, attendance tracking, and role-based access modules using Android SDK and MVC architecture.
Integrated Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) for push notifications; used SQLite for offline-first local data persistence.

highlights: Participation in Hacklytics (2026), organized by Georgia Tech.
Contributed 1.5 years at UF Recreation and Wellness.
1st Prize at Smart India Hackathon (SIH)2020, organized by Ministry of Education, Govt. of India.

projects.title: E-Tendering Platform
projects.description: A cost-effective web-based E-Tendering system replacing hardware Digital Signature Certificates with Aadhaar-based OTP verification and DigiLocker integration. Automated bid submission, identity verification, and document archiving — reducing operational costs by 65%. Won 1st Prize nationally at Smart India Hackathon 2020 against 200,000+ participants.

projects.title: Domain-Adapted RAG for Biomedical QA
projects.description: Fine-tuned Phi-3 Mini (3.8B) with LoRA and Q4_K_M quantization for local deployment via Ollama. Built a RAG pipeline using Sentence Transformers and FAISS over MedQA documents to reduce hallucinations, with measurable ROUGE and BERTScore gains. Implemented Domain-Adaptive Pre-Training (DAPT) and pseudo-label distillation on PubMedQA.

projects.title: Speech-based Emotion Recognition
projects.description: End-to-end SER pipeline classifying 5 emotions from 3-second speech clips using 88 eGeMAPSv02 acoustic functionals extracted via openSMILE. A 1200-tree Random Forest with balanced class weighting outperformed CNN/RNN baselines, achieving ~82% accuracy on a blind test set with speaker-independent 5-fold cross-validation.

projects.title: Hindi / Hinglish Toxicity Detection
projects.description: Fine-tuned XLM-Roberta for multi-label toxicity classification on Hindi social media data with Integrated Gradients (Captum) explainability. Evaluated GPT-4o-mini for zero-shot, few-shot, and chain-of-thought detection on 5K samples — achieving 85.6% accuracy and 94.9% precision — alongside a cost-aware framework tracking inference cost ($2.66 for full dataset).

projects.title: Movie Recommendation System
projects.description: Data-driven recommendation system on 20,000+ IMDb and TMDB records combining KNN (Cosine Similarity), XGBoost, and HDBSCAN clustering. Engineered genre embeddings and keyword features, achieving a 30% boost in relevance scoring. Wrapped in an interactive Streamlit dashboard with Plotly for real-time filtering by mood, genre, actor, or director.

projects.title: Roam.io — Travel Management App
projects.description: Full-stack travel management application using React.js and PostgreSQL for itinerary planning, attraction discovery, and booking. Features a multi-day itinerary planner with calendar visualization, dynamic SQL-backed search across 1000+ travel records, and Google Sheets API integration for live admin feedback — improving task completion time by 25% in peer testing.

projects.title: Reddit Engine — Backend in Go
projects.description: Reddit-inspired backend engine in Go implementing posts, voting, messaging, and subreddit management for 10+ simulated users via RESTful APIs. Leveraged goroutines and channel-based IPC for concurrent, race-condition-free handling of real-time votes and nested comment threads. Achieved >95% functional test coverage across all core subsystems.

projects.title: Metacognition Tracker
projects.description: Web-based platform for tracking learner metacognition via clickstream data, navigation flow, and NLP-driven reflection scoring (TF-IDF). Behavioral metrics like dwell time and click hesitation were combined with linguistic cues to deliver adaptive nudges, yielding a 25% improvement in learning outcomes over a 45-day study. Validated across 60+ sessions with a Pearson correlation of 0.82 against instructor rubric scores.

hackathons.description: Built a web-based E-Tendering solution replacing hardware DSCs with Aadhaar-based OTP verification and DigiLocker integration, cutting procurement operational costs by 65% and eliminating manual errors.

Built a real-time dual-screen F1 race strategy simulator using a WebSocket architecture. An XGBoost model (R² = 0.95, MAE ~0.29s) predicts baseline lap times, feeding a NumPy Monte Carlo engine running 10,000 race simulations in <0.2s. Chaos events like rain and safety cars are injected live via an iPad console, with Gemini LLM formatting results into team radio calls.

ppoOffers.description: Earned a Pre-Placement Offer from LTIMindtree through the Infinity Coding Challenge (ICC), a national competition with 100,000+ participants. Successfully cleared all 3 rounds, finishing in the top 0.2% of participants to qualify for the SDE2 PPO.

Secured a Pre-Placement Offer from Infosys by competing in HackWithInfy 2020, a national-level coding competition with 200,000+ participants. Cleared Round 1 and Round 2, finishing in the top 0.3% of all participants to qualify for the SDE2 PPO.

Received a Pre-Placement Offer from TCS by qualifying in TCS CodeVita Season 8, one of the world's largest coding competitions with 300,000+ participants. Cleared Round 1, placing in the top 3–5% of all participants to secure the SDE1 offer.

Secured a Pre-Placement Offer from Persistent Systems through Smart India Hackathon (SIH) 2020, a national hackathon with 500,000+ student participants. Competed at the Grand Finale level among 1,500+ teams nationwide, earning an SDE PPO as an industry sponsor selection.

awards.title: Technical Improvement Award
awards.description: Awarded for consistently delivering complex tasks with high quality and thorough documentation. Recognized for my courage and capability in tackling and successfully completing a diverse range of technical challenges.

awards.title: Special Recognition Award
awards.description: Received special recognition from the client for exceptional performance as a quick learner and unwavering support to team members.

awards.title: 1st Prize — Smart India Hackathon 2020
awards.organisation: Ministry of Education, Government of India
awards.description: Won 1st prize nationally for the E-Tendering problem statement, competing against 200,000+ participants and 33,000+ teams from across India.

awards.title: Merit Award for Excellence in Competitive Programming
awards.description: Honored for exceptional performance in competitive programming contests, consistently achieving a top 3 rank in 3 out of 4 events. This award recognizes my dedication, problem-solving skills, and ability to perform under pressure.
